evidence.title: White House Rubio release on Operation Absolute Resolve and Venezuela policy
evidence.source_description: Official White House release collecting Secretary Rubio statements after Operation Absolute Resolve, opened during plaintiff merits investigation.
evidence.relevance: Official White House source bearing on operation characterization, objectives, continued U.S. pressure/control policy, and adverse statements calling the action a raid rather than an invasion or extended operation.

evidence.title: War.gov: Trump Announces U.S. Military's Capture of Maduro
evidence.source_description: Official U.S. Department of War news story, opened from War.gov during plaintiff merits investigation.
evidence.relevance: Primary official U.S. source confirming Operation Absolute Resolve in Caracas, Venezuela, U.S. armed forces/military operation, ground-based extraction force, capture/removal of Maduro, and U.S. transition-control statements.
